_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell RNA sequencing of neurofibromas reveals a tumor microenvironment favorable for neural regeneration and immune suppression in a neurofibromatosis type 1 porcine model.

_contextSnippet: CD34, which highlighted fibroblasts, fibroblast-like cells, and a subset of Schwann cells. The adjacent normal tissue showed little to no positivity for these markers
details: Highlighted fibroblasts, fibroblast-like cells, and a subset of Schwann cells in neurofibromas, with little to no positivity in adjacent normal tissue
